gamingCookieDescStoryPlayerState: Saves the state of story games (current scene, statistics, and history)
gamingCookieDescDuceNonDuceRecord: Saves the record (score and time) in the Duce Non Duce game
radarErrDenied: To use the radar you must allow location access. GPS and a secure (HTTPS) connection are required.
radarErrNoChurch: No church within radar range. Either you're a hermit, or you're out at sea.
radarErrSearch: The radar isn't responding (church search failed).
